notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Alex Freeland hits a sacrifice bunt. Throwing error by pitcher Kevin Gausman. Hyeseong Kim to 3rd. Alex Freeland to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Davis Schneider pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Davis Schneider walks. Ernie Clement to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Alex Freeland singles on a ground ball to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Alex Freeland to 2nd. Alex Freeland advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by catcher Brandon Valenzuela.

notableEvents.label: Davis Schneider pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Smith challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Davis Schneider called out on strikes.
